title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Southaal Travel Ltd
body: "Application number 5213  Applicant Southall Travel Limited objected to the name used by Southaal Travel Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 5 June 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Southaal Travel Ltd is changed to 15747200, Ltd. "
